commands.review_summary:
The PR teaches plugin install recovery to recognize versioned official npm specs and remove validation-reported missing `plugins.load.paths` entries before persisting repaired install config, with focused CLI tests.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +52. Total +104 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and supplied proof: current main compares versioned official npm specs against the bare catalog spec, so `@openclaw/discord@2026.5.22` misses recovery metadata; the PR body includes after-fix CLI output showing install success and config validation passing. I did not reproduce the full NemoClaw Docker image build locally in this read-only review.
